text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two key tasks in this area are image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in healthcare, computer vision can help analyse medical scans. In security, it can be used for facial recognition. Perhaps the most exciting application is in self-driving cars, where computer vision helps the vehicle recognise traffic signs, pedestrians, and other cars to navigate safely. This technology continues to improve rapidly.
